docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,375.00 FILED BY NISTHAL, CESAR A. AS TO DEFENDANT ANAYA, ROSARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
